title: Architect Declarative Rules Engines
description: Architect declarative rules engines using JSON-based configurations to externalize business logic. Implement solutions like `json-rules-engine` to decouple volatile business rules from the core codebase.
objectives: Architect declarative rules engines using JSON-based configurations to externalize business logic.
Implement solutions like `json-rules-engine` to decouple volatile business rules from the core codebase.
